title: gem
html:
gem

Inherit

This requires the name of an installed gem to be provided, e.g., `debug` is usually installed.

gem open debug
gem build /path/to/script.rb
gem install --file /path/to/script.rb

Shell

This requires the name of an installed gem to be provided, e.g., `debug` is usually installed.

gem open -e '/bin/sh -s' debug
